strategy: Treat this as a shield race. Didgeri stacks Tower Shields on a 3-round cycle: -25% on Round 1, -50% on Round 2, -90% on Round 3, then repeats. Time your hit around them.
Hit on the round the shield is weakest for you, or carry shatter and shield-break (Shatter, Enfeeble, pierce enchants) to strip the stacked Towers before your finisher.
This is a team fight: 48,935 Health and 184% boost. Funnel every blade to one hitter, have supports Feint and blade, and let the hitter swing last.
Watch the schools: it takes 28% Fire/Life but resists Storm and Death at 68% and most other schools at 48%. A Fire or Life hitter with pierce fits best.
Line the burst up with the -25% shield round when possible, and stack enough pierce or shatter that even a -90% Tower does not save it.
It has 47% pierce and hits hard, so keep the healer topping the hitter and blade only right before the swing to avoid wasted setup.
cheatNotes: On Round 1 and every third round after, it self-casts a -25% Tower Shield, the lightest shield in the cycle.
On Round 2 and every third round after, a -50% Tower Shield goes up, so a mid-cycle hit eats more absorb.
On Round 3 and every third round after, a -90% Tower Shield lands; hitting into this round without shatter or pierce wastes most of your damage.
